utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Check each in the final plan for presence and full specification with costs. 1) health_coverage: Includes physical and mental with costs in 'current' and also 'optimized' options with costs. Fully specified. 2) property_coverage: Specifies home/contents insurance with costs in 'current'; optimized mentions enhancements with an additional cost. Adequate costs provided for coverage; counts as specified. 3) travel_coverage: Provides travel insurance base plan and add-ons with costs; optimized enhancements with a cost. Fully specified. 4) additional_services: Enhancement services listed with costs in current and optimized. Fully specified. 5) total_budget: Provides current monthly, optimized monthly, and annual costs. Fully specified. All five required items appear and include costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: I matched each named plan in the final coverage plan to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. Only items that appear in both were mapped. Items such as 'Bradesco Executive International', 'ExecutiveCare Wellness', 'Concierge Medical Services', 'PremiumSecure Luxury', 'ExecutiveGlobal Platinum', 'Medical Emergency Plus', and 'Executive Insurance Concierge' do not exist in the ground-truth list, so they are omitted. The optimized selections that do exist in the ground truth are: LifeFirst Standard Plan (health physical/mental categories), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health), PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health). Travel 'Advanced concierge telemedicine support' and property 'enhancements' are descriptions, not specific rated items, so they are not mapped.
